subject: Attribution export blocked
message: How do I export attribution reports before our board meeting?
resolution_text: Open Analytics then Attribution then click Download report. Choose CSV when the export modal asks for file type.

subject: Invoice download
message: Where can I download invoices for last quarter?
resolution_text: Open Billing then Invoices, filter by the quarter, and download the PDF from the invoice row.
